mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tiktok_sync_logs ( advertiser_id, sync_type, api_endpoint, request_method, request_params, response_code, response_data, status, error_message, duration_ms, executed_at ) VALUES ( #{advertiserId}, #{syncType}, #{apiEndpoint}, COALESCE(#{requestMethod}, 'GET'), #{requestParams}, #{responseCode}, #{responseData}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'success'), #{errorMessage}, #{durationMs}, COALESCE(#{executedAt}, NOW()) )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_sync_logs WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_sync_logs WHERE status = 'failed' ORDER BY executed_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
